productDisplayName: Fossil Men Black Dial Chronograph Watch FS4249
description: Case style: Analogue watch, has a circular case with a crystal embellished fixed bezel, and a stainless steel backDial style: Black dial, has markings and three handsFeatures: Three-face chronograph display, a screw to reset time, two push buttons to adjust the features, a tachymeter, a date apertureStrap style: Steel-toned bracelet-style strap secured with a butterfly claspWater-resistant up to 50 mComes in a signature Fossil collectible tinWarranty: 2 years against manufacturing defects from the date of purchaseWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
